framework.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
framework.description: Handoff-based agent architecture (Swarm pattern) — lightweight primitives for dynamic agent delegation. A ReAct loop where agents transfer control to specialists via handoff tools. Minimalist design: no graphs, no built-in vector memory.

modules.name: Runner
modules.description: Execution loop: manages turns, dispatches tool calls, evaluates guardrails, handles handoff transitions, produces RunResult.

modules.name: Agent
modules.description: Central class: name, instructions (system prompt), tools list, optional output_type (Pydantic), optional handoffs to other agents, optional I/O guardrails.

modules.name: Handoff
modules.description: Delegation primitive: exposed as a tool (transfer_to_<agent>). Runner switches active agent, transfers conversation context.

modules.name: Guardrails
modules.description: Input guardrails (screen before processing), output guardrails (validate final response), tool guardrails (wrap tool calls).

modules.name: Session
modules.description: Persistent conversation with auto message history. Default SQLiteSession; custom backends supported.

modules.name: Tracing
modules.description: First-party spans: nested trees showing model calls, tool invocations, handoff transitions. Viewable in OpenAI dashboard.

modules.name: Tool
modules.description: External function integrations. Can be @function_tool decorated Python functions. Agent-as-Tool enables hub-and-spoke orchestration.

metadata.description: Runner.run(agent, input) starts the execution loop for the given agent
Input guardrail screens user message before agent processes it
Agent calls transfer_to_<agent> tool to delegate to a specialist
Runner switches active agent, transfers conversation context to the specialist
Agent invokes tools; tool results flow back
Runner saves/loads conversation history to/from Session
Each model call, tool invocation, and handoff emits a trace span
Output guardrail validates final response before returning to user

phases.name: Agent Invocation & ReAct Loop
phases.description: Runner invokes agent; agent reasons, calls tools, may hand off; loop continues until final answer

steps.description: Agent processes instructions + conversation history, decides: tool call, handoff, or final answer
If agent chooses tool call: tool executes, result appends to conversation
If agent chooses handoff: Runner switches active agent, transfers context
If final answer: output guardrail validates before returning

phases.name: Session Persistence & Tracing
phases.description: Runner persists conversation state and emits tracing data

steps.description: Runner saves complete conversation history to Session store
All spans (model calls, tools, handoffs) flushed to tracing backend
